summary.conclusion: Remaining no-timeout CMT50 items were audited item-by-item with emission, verifier, source-quality, and answer-accuracy evidence separated.
notes: Selected run set contains 47 item runs.
38 items emitted parseable JSON captured by the runner.
Source flag counts among failed items: {'duplicate_option_labels': 2}.

probes.name: remaining_no_timeout_batches
probes.changed_variable: removed fixed answer timeout and used 20-minute idle-output guard
probes.interpretation: This separates answer-finalization failures from wrong-answer and source-quality failures.

probes.name: batch_runner_problem_list_fix
probes.changed_variable: used ProblemList string parsing for background batch launch
probes.result: Initial background launch with a comma string failed at PowerShell int[] binding; ProblemList avoids that harness-only failure.
probes.interpretation: The failed initial launch is a harness issue and is excluded from model scoring.

items.observed_failure: Emitted parseable JSON for cmt_index_01_answer, but verifier failed: actual='c_↑dagger(k)c_↑(k);c_↓dagger(k)c_↓(k);c_↑dagger(k)c_↓(k);c_↓dagger(k)c_↑(k)', expected='\\langle c_\\uparrow^\\dagger(k) c_\\uparrow(k) \\rangle; \\langle c_\\downarrow^\\dagger(k) c_\\downarrow(k) \\rangle'.
items.root_cause_hypothesis: The model emitted parseable JSON and the verifier compared it against the gold answer, but the parsed answer did not match.
items.recommended_action: Use this item as model/domain reasoning feedback; inspect stderr reasoning for the missed physics mechanism before changing prompts.
items.retest_plan: Rerun a small focused probe for this item's method family, then rerun the item with the same verifier.

items.retest_plan: Repair the prompt/gold/options or mark the item ambiguous, then rerun only this item.

items.observed_failure: No parseable JSON for cmt_index_23_answer; status=completed, stdout_bytes=0, stderr_bytes=279.
items.root_cause_hypothesis: The Kimi CLI exited with provider.rate_limit/429 before producing a final stdout JSON object.

evidence.note: environment/quota failure, not a physics answer failure

items.recommended_action: Wait for Kimi quota reset or use an available quota lane, then rerun this item; do not count it as a model-answer failure.
items.retest_plan: Rerun the same item after quota is refreshed and verify stdout JSON is captured.

recommended_iterations.action: Cluster wrong-but-parseable answers by CMT type and build focused probes for the largest clusters.
recommended_iterations.why: These are clean model/domain misses once output and source quality are separated.
recommended_iterations.retest: Rerun one representative item per cluster after the reasoning intervention.

recommended_iterations.action: Quarantine high-severity source-flag items from capability scoring until prompt/gold/options are audited.
recommended_iterations.why: Source defects produce misleading negative signal for agent iteration.
recommended_iterations.retest: Repair or exclude flagged items, then regenerate clean-subset score.
